ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Authentication ID for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Latest status update by the user */,
  "s_ext" REAL /* Score for Extraversion (self-assessment) */,
  "s_neu" REAL /* Score for Neuroticism (self-assessment) */,
  "s_agr" REAL /* Score for Agreeableness (self-assessment) */,
  "s_con" REAL /* Score for Conscientiousness (self-assessment) */,
  "s_opn" REAL /* Score for Openness (self-assessment) */,
  "c_ext" TEXT /* Classification for Extraversion (n: no, y: yes) */,
  "c_neu" TEXT /* Classification for Neuroticism (n: no, y: yes) */,
  "c_agr" TEXT /* Classification for Agreeableness (n: no, y: yes) */,
  "c_con" TEXT /* Classification for Conscientiousness (n: no, y: yes) */,
  "c_opn" TEXT /* Classification for Openness (n: no, y: yes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was created */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user's profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests and hobbies of the user */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the user */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_updates" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the status */,
  "status_text" TEXT /* Text of the status update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status was posted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the status was posted */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is private or public */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score of the status */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_network_metrics" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the social network metrics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "network_size" INTEGER /* Size of the user's social network */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality of the user */,
  "normalized_betweenness" REAL /* Normalized betweenness centrality of the user */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the user's social network */,
  "brokerage" INTEGER /* Brokerage score of the user */,
  "normalized_brokerage" REAL /* Normalized brokerage score of the user */,
  "transitivity" REAL /* Transitivity of the user's social network */,
  "influence_score" REAL /* Overall influence score of the user */,
  "community_size" INTEGER /* Size of the user's community */,
  "community_density" REAL /* Density of the user's community */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the metrics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_network_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the interaction */,
  "target_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_content" TEXT /* Content of the interaction (e.g., comment text) */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction is private or public */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score of the interaction */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the interaction was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_target_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sentiment analysis */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status update */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment analysis (e.g., NLP model, manual review) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the sentiment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sentiments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES status_updates ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data analyst, content moderator, executive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "actual_spend" REAL /* Actual amount spent on the campaign */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the campaign received */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the campaign received */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the campaign details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targeting" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the targeting entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user targeted by the campaign */,
  "target_reason" TEXT /* Reason for targeting the user (e.g., interests, demographics) */,
  "targeted_interests" TEXT /* Interests of the targeted users */,
  "targeted_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the targeted users */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the targeting criteria were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targeting_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targeting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
